test.name: defineVariable1
test.description: simplest variable

test.name: defineVariable2
test.description: simple use of a variable

test.name: defineVariable3
test.description: simple use of a variable 2 selects

test.name: defineVariable4
test.description: use of a variable in separate contexts

test.name: defineVariable5
test.description: use of a variable in separate contexts defined in 2 but used in 1

test.name: defineVariable6
test.description: use of different variables in different contexts

test.name: defineVariable7
test.description: 2 vars, one unused

test.name: defineVariable9
test.description: use of a variable outside context throws error

test.name: defineVariable10
test.description: use undefined variable throws error

test.name: defineVariable12
test.description: defineVariable() could not be the first child

test.name: defineVariable13
test.description: sequence of variable definitions tweak

test.name: defineVariable14
test.description: sequence of variable definitions original

test.name: defineVariable15
test.description: multi-tree vars valid

test.name: defineVariable16
test.description: multi-tree vars exception

test.name: dvConceptMapExample
test.description: realistic example with conceptmap

test.name: defineVariable19
test.description: defineVariable in function parameters (1)

test.name: dvParametersDontColide
test.description: defineVariable in function parameters (2)

test.name: dvUsageOutsideScopeThrows
test.description: use of a variable outside context throws error

test.name: dvDoesNotChangeScopedVars
test.description: defineVariable does not change $this or $index

test.name: testComment2
testComment3
test.expression: 2 + 2 /* This is a multi-line comment Any text enclosed within is ignored +2 */

test.name: testComment4
test.expression: 2 + 2 /* This is a multi-line comment Any text enclosed within is ignored */ +2

test.name: testComment5
test.expression: /* This is a multi-line comment Any text enclosed within is ignored */ 2+2

test.name: testExtractBirthDate
test.description: Extract birthDate

test.name: testPatientHasBirthDate
test.description: patient has a birthDate

test.name: testPatientTelecomTypes
test.description: patient telecom types

group.name: testBasics
group.description: Tests ported from the Java Unit Tests

test.name: testLiteralStringNonEscape1
test.description: Backslash before non-escape char is dropped: \p becomes p

test.name: testLiteralStringNonEscape2
test.description: Escaped backslash followed by p: \\p becomes \p (2 chars)

test.name: testLiteralStringNonEscape2b
test.description: Non-escape \p (1 char) differs from escaped \\p (2 chars)

test.name: testLiteralStringNonEscape3
test.description: Backslash before digit is dropped: \3 becomes 3

test.name: testLiteralStringNonEscape4
test.description: Incomplete unicode escape treated as non-escape: \u005 becomes u005

test.name: testLiteralStringNonEscape5
test.description: Non-escape in middle of string: a\pb becomes apb

test.name: testLiteralTimeTimezoneOffset
test.description: times don't have timezones, should be a syntax issue, not just execution

test.name: testPolarityNegateDecimal
test.description: AI: Unary negation with Decimal type

test.name: testPolarityNegateQuantity
test.description: AI: Unary negation with Quantity type, unit unchanged

test.name: testPolarityEmptyInput
test.description: HR: Empty input to unary negation returns empty

test.name: testPolarityUnaryPlusInteger
test.description: AI: Unary + returns integer operand unchanged

test.name: testPolarityIncompatibleType
test.description: AI: Unary negation on string type signals error

test.name: testPolarityNegateLong
test.description: AI: Unary negation with Long type returns negated Long

test.name: testPolarityUnaryPlusLong
test.description: AI: Unary + with Long type returns value unchanged

test.name: testPolarityNegateOverflow
test.description: HR: Negating min Integer value overflows, returns empty

test.name: testEmpty2
test.description: AI: Returns false when input collection is not empty

test.name: testDateConvertsToDate
test.description: AI: Date item returns true

test.name: testDateTimeConvertsToDate
test.description: AI: DateTime item returns true

test.name: testIntegerConvertsToDateFalse
test.description: AI: Non-convertible type returns false

test.name: testStringConvertsToDateFalse
test.description: AI: Non-convertible string returns false

test.name: testEmptyConvertsToDate
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testMultipleItemsConvertsToDate
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testConvertsToDateWithFormat
test.description: HR: Format parameter overrides default format

test.name: testConvertsToDateFormatIgnoredNonString
test.description: HR: Format parameter is ignored for non-string input

test.name: testDateTimeConvertsToDateTime
test.description: AI: DateTime item returns true

test.name: testDateConvertsToDateTime
test.description: AI: Date item returns true

test.name: testIntegerConvertsToDateTimeFalse
test.description: AI: Non-convertible type (Integer) returns false

test.name: testStringNotConvertsToDateTime
test.description: AI: Non-convertible string returns false

test.name: testConvertsToDateTimeWithFormat
test.description: HR: Format parameter overrides default format

test.name: testConvertsToDateTimeFormatIgnoredNonString
test.description: HR: Format parameter is ignored for non-string input

test.name: testMultipleItemsConvertsToDateTime
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testEmptyConvertsToDateTime
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testStringNotConvertsToTime
test.description: AI: Non-convertible string returns false

test.name: testEmptyConvertsToTime
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testMultipleItemsConvertsToTime
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testIntegerNotConvertsToTime
test.description: AI: Non-Time type (Integer) returns false

test.name: testStringTimezoneConvertsToTime
test.description: HR: String with timezone offset does not convert to Time

test.name: testTimeConvertsToTime
test.description: AI: Time literal returns true for convertsToTime

test.name: testEmptyConvertsToInteger
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testMultipleItemsConvertsToInteger
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testIntegerConvertsToLong
test.description: AI: Integer literal returns true for convertsToLong

test.name: testIntegerZeroConvertsToLong
test.description: AI: Integer zero returns true for convertsToLong

test.name: testStringConvertsToLong
test.description: AI: Convertible string returns true for convertsToLong

test.name: testStringNonNumericConvertsToLongFalse
test.description: HR: Non-convertible string returns false for convertsToLong

test.name: testStringDecimalConvertsToLongFalse
test.description: HR: Decimal string returns false for convertsToLong

test.name: testBooleanConvertsToLong
test.description: HR: Boolean returns true for convertsToLong

test.name: testMultipleItemsConvertsToLong
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testEmptyConvertsToLong
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testToLong1
test.description: AI: Integer literal converts to Long

test.name: testToLong2
test.description: AI: String converts to Long

test.name: testToLong3
test.description: AI: Negative string converts to Long

test.name: testToLong4
test.description: AI: String with + prefix converts to Long

test.name: testToLong5
test.description: AI: Boolean true converts to 1

test.name: testToLong6
test.description: AI: Boolean false converts to 0

test.name: testToLong7
test.description: HR: Non-convertible type (Date) returns empty

test.name: testToLong8
test.description: AI: Non-convertible string returns empty

test.name: testToLong9
test.description: HR: Decimal string returns empty

test.name: testToLong10
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testToLong11
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testEmptyConvertsToDecimal
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testMultipleItemsConvertsToDecimal
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testEmptyCollectionConvertsToQuantity
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testQuantityLiteralConvertsToQuantity
test.description: AI: Quantity literal item returns true for convertsToQuantity

test.name: testMultipleItemsConvertsToQuantity
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testConvertsToQuantityUnitSame
test.description: HR: Unit argument with same unit returns true

test.name: testStringQuantityDayLiteralToQuantity
test.description: Contested: calendar day units are not equal to ucum day units

test.name: testBooleanTrueToQuantity
test.description: AI: Boolean true converts to quantity 1.0 with default unit

test.name: testBooleanFalseToQuantity
test.description: AI: Boolean false converts to quantity 0.0 with default unit

test.name: testEmptyCollectionToQuantity
test.description: HR: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testQuantityToQuantity
test.description: HR: Quantity input returns itself unchanged

test.name: testMultipleItemsToQuantity
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals an error

test.name: testNonMatchingTypeToQuantity
test.description: HR: Non-convertible type (Date) returns empty

test.name: testCalendarDurationYearToMonths
test.description: HR: Calendar duration conversion 2 years = 24 months via toQuantity(unit)

test.name: testCalendarDurationDayToHours
test.description: HR: Calendar duration conversion 3 days = 72 hours via toQuantity(unit)

test.name: testEmptyConvertsToBoolean
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testMultipleInputConvertsToBoolean
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input collection signals error

test.name: testDecimalNonBooleanConvertsToBoolean
test.description: AI: Decimal not equal to Boolean representation returns false

test.name: testStringNonBooleanConvertsToBoolean
test.description: AI: String not convertible to Boolean returns false

test.name: testBooleanTrueToBoolean
test.description: AI: Boolean true input returns itself unchanged

test.name: testBooleanFalseToBoolean
test.description: AI: Boolean false input returns itself unchanged

test.name: testDecimalTrueToBoolean
test.description: AI: Decimal 1.0 converts to true

test.name: testDecimalFalseToBoolean
test.description: AI: Decimal 0.0 converts to false

test.name: testDecimalNonBoolToBoolean
test.description: AI: Non-convertible decimal (2.5) returns empty

test.name: testDecimalNonBoolToBoolean2
test.description: AI: Non-convertible decimal (0.5) returns empty

test.name: testStringTToBoolean
test.description: AI: String 't' converts to true

test.name: testStringYesToBoolean
test.description: AI: String 'yes' converts to true

test.name: testStringYToBoolean
test.description: AI: String 'y' converts to true

test.name: testString1ToBoolean
test.description: AI: String '1' converts to true

test.name: testString1_0ToBoolean
test.description: AI: String '1.0' converts to true

test.name: testStringFToBoolean
test.description: AI: String 'f' converts to false

test.name: testStringNoToBoolean
test.description: AI: String 'no' converts to false

test.name: testStringNToBoolean
test.description: AI: String 'n' converts to false

test.name: testString0ToBoolean
test.description: AI: String '0' converts to false

test.name: testString0_0ToBoolean
test.description: AI: String '0.0' converts to false

test.name: testStringCaseInsensitiveToBoolean
test.description: AI: Case-insensitive string 'TRUE' converts to true

test.name: testStringCaseInsensitiveToBoolean2
test.description: AI: Case-insensitive string 'Yes' converts to true

test.name: testStringCaseInsensitiveToBoolean3
test.description: AI: Case-insensitive string 'FALSE' converts to false

test.name: testStringNonBoolToBoolean
test.description: AI: Non-convertible string returns empty

test.name: testNonConvertibleTypeToBoolean
test.description: AI: Non-convertible type (Date) returns empty

test.name: testMultipleInputToBoolean
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals an error

test.name: testEmptyToBoolean
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testDateConvertsToString
test.description: AI: Date item returns true

test.name: testTimeConvertsToString
test.description: AI: Time item returns true

test.name: testDateTimeConvertsToString
test.description: AI: DateTime item returns true

test.name: testNonConvertibleConvertsToString
test.description: AI: Non-convertible type (HumanName) returns false

test.name: testMultipleInputConvertsToString
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals an error

test.name: testEmptyConvertsToString
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testExists4
test.expression: Patient.maritalStatus.coding.exists(code = 'P' and system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-MaritalStatus') or Patient.maritalStatus.coding.exists(code = 'A' and system = 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v3-MaritalStatus')

test.name: testExists6
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns false

test.name: testExists7
test.description: $index parameter usage in criteria

test.name: testExists8
test.description: AI: exists(criteria) is equivalent to where(criteria).exists()

test.name: testAllTrue5
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns true

test.name: testAllTrue6
test.description: AI: Collection containing only false values returns false

test.name: testAllFalse1
test.description: AI: Returns true when all items are false

test.name: testAllFalse2
test.description: AI: Returns false when some items are true

test.name: testAllFalse3
test.description: AI: Empty input returns true

test.name: testAnyFalse1
test.description: AI: Returns true when any items in collection are false

test.name: testAnyFalse2
test.description: AI: Returns false when all items are true

test.name: testAnyFalse3
test.description: AI: Empty input returns false

test.name: testAnyTrue1
test.description: AI: Returns true when any items in collection are true

test.name: testAnyTrue2
test.description: AI: Returns false when all items are false

test.name: testAnyTrue3
test.description: AI: Empty input returns false

test.name: testAll5
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns true

test.name: testAll6
test.description: AI: $index variable available in criteria

test.name: testAll7
test.description: AI: Criteria returning empty (three-valued logic) treated as not true

test.name: testSubSetOf4
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns true

test.name: testSubSetOf5
test.description: AI: Non-empty input with empty other collection returns false

test.name: testSuperSetOf3
test.description: AI: Empty other collection returns true

test.name: testSuperSetOf4
test.description: AI: Empty input collection with non-empty other returns false

test.name: testQuantity1
test.description: equality with unit conversion

test.name: testQuantity2
test.description: equivalence with unit conversion

test.name: testQuantity3
test.description: not-equals with unit conversion (different values)

test.name: testQuantity4
test.description: equivalence with unit conversion

test.name: testQuantity5
test.description: equality with unit conversion: calendar units

test.name: testQuantity6
test.description: equality with unit conversion: mixed UCUM and calendar units

test.name: testQuantity7
test.description: less-than with unit conversion

test.name: testQuantity8
test.description: greater-than with unit conversion

test.name: testQuantity9
test.description: multiplication with unit conversion

test.name: testQuantity10
test.description: division producing compound unit

test.name: testQuantity11
test.description: division of same units produces dimensionless quantity

test.name: testCollectionBoolean1
test.description: singleton evaluation: multi-item collection as criterion is an error

test.name: testCollectionBoolean2
test.description: empty collection as criterion evaluates to false

test.name: testCollectionBoolean3
test.description: baseline: simple boolean true criterion

test.name: testCollectionBoolean4
test.description: singleton evaluation: union with empty resolves to single-item collection

test.name: testCollectionBoolean5
test.description: short-circuit: otherwise-result not evaluated when criterion is true

test.name: testCollectionBoolean6
test.description: short-circuit: true-result not evaluated when criterion is false

test.name: testIsDistinctEmpty
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns true

test.name: testIsDistinctSingle
test.description: AI: Single item collection returns true

test.name: testIsDistinctQuantityEquals
test.description: AI: Distinctness uses equals semantics: quantities with same value but different decimal precision are equal

test.name: testDistinct7
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty collection

test.name: testDistinct8
test.description: AI: Uses equals (=) for uniqueness: case-different strings remain distinct

test.name: testDistinct9
test.description: HR: Result order not guaranteed: verifies distinct output without order constraint

test.name: testCount5
test.description: AI: Returns 0 when the input collection is empty

test.name: testWhere5
test.description: AI: $index parameter usage in criteria expression

test.name: testWhere6
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testWhere7
test.description: AI: Non-boolean criteria result signals error

test.name: testWhere8
test.description: AI: Items where criteria evaluates to empty are excluded

test.name: testSelect4
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testSelect5
test.description: AI: $index variable available in projection

test.name: testSelect6
test.description: AI: Empty projection result adds no item to output

test.name: testDescendants1
test.description: AI: descendants() is equivalent to repeat(children())

test.name: testDescendants2
test.description: AI: descendants on multiple input items returns descendants of all items

test.name: testDescendants3
test.description: AI: descendants does not include the input item itself

test.name: testChildren1
test.description: AI: children on empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testChildren2
test.description: AI: children returns child nodes from multiple input items

test.name: testChildren3
test.description: AI: children on leaf node returns empty

test.name: testRepeat6
test.description: AI: repeat on empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testRepeat7
test.description: AI: $this is set before each iteration in repeat projection

test.name: testRepeat8
test.description: AI: $index is undefined within repeat context

test.name: testRepeat9
test.description: AI: Deduplication: repeat excludes items already in output (equals-based), so 6 givens become 4 distinct

test.name: testRepeat10
test.description: AI: repeat(item) includes top-level items unlike descendants().select(item)

test.name: testRepeatAll1
test.description: AI: repeatAll keeps duplicates unlike repeat: 5 givens not 3

test.name: testRepeatAll2
test.description: AI: repeatAll returns more items than repeat due to duplicates

test.name: testRepeatAll3
test.description: AI: repeatAll traverses hierarchical item structure

test.name: testRepeatAll4
test.description: AI: repeatAll on empty input returns empty

test.name: testRepeatAll5
test.description: AI: repeatAll traverses expansion contains hierarchy

test.name: testAggregate5
test.description: HR: $index variable accessible in aggregator expression

test.name: testAggregate6
test.description: HR: Average expressed using aggregate

test.name: testAggregate7
test.description: HR: Init argument evaluated on outer context with access to outer $this

test.name: testSum1
test.description: AI: Sum of integer collection

test.name: testSum2
test.description: AI: Sum of decimal collection

test.name: testSum3
test.description: AI: Sum of quantity collection

test.name: testSum4
test.description: AI: Sum of empty collection returns empty

test.name: testSum5
test.description: AI: Mixed types throw exception

test.name: testAvg1
test.description: AI: Average of decimal collection

test.name: testAvg2
test.description: AI: Average of quantity collection

test.name: testAvg3
test.description: AI: Integer arguments implicitly converted to Decimal

test.name: testAvg4
test.description: HR: Mixed types throw exception

test.name: testAvg5
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testAvg6
test.description: AI: Average of single item returns that item

test.name: testMin1
test.description: AI: Min of integer collection returns minimum

test.name: testMin2
test.description: AI: Min of integer collection does not return 0

test.name: testMin3
test.description: AI: Min of decimal collection

test.name: testMin4
test.description: AI: Min of quantity collection

test.name: testMin5
test.description: AI: Min of date collection

test.name: testMin6
test.description: AI: Min of dateTime collection

test.name: testMin7
test.description: AI: Min of time collection

test.name: testMin8
test.description: AI: Min of string collection

test.name: testMin9
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testMin10
test.description: HR: Mixed types throw exception

test.name: testMin11
test.description: AI: Min of single item returns that item

test.name: testMin12
test.description: Min of long collection

test.name: testMax1
test.description: AI: Max of integer collection returns maximum

test.name: testMax2
test.description: AI: Max of integer collection does not return 0

test.name: testMax3
test.description: AI: Max of decimal collection

test.name: testMax4
test.description: AI: Max of quantity collection

test.name: testMax5
test.description: AI: Max of date collection

test.name: testMax6
test.description: AI: Max of dateTime collection

test.name: testMax7
test.description: AI: Max of time collection

test.name: testMax8
test.description: AI: Max of string collection

test.name: testMax9
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testMax10
test.description: AI: Mixed types throw exception

test.name: testMax11
test.description: AI: Max of single item returns that item

test.name: testMax12
test.description: AI: Max of long collection

test.name: testIndexer3
test.description: AI: Index outside boundaries returns empty collection

test.name: testIndexer4
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty when indexed

test.name: testSingle3
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testFirstLast5
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty collection

test.name: testFirstLast6
test.description: AI: first() is equivalent to item[0]

test.name: testFirstLast3
test.description: AI: Empty collection returns empty

test.name: testFirstLast4
test.description: AI: Single item collection returns that item

test.name: testTail3
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testTail4
test.description: AI: Single item input collection returns empty

test.name: testSkip5
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testSkip6
test.description: AI: num zero returns input collection unchanged

test.name: testSkip7
test.description: AI: Negative num returns input collection unchanged

test.name: testTake8
test.description: AI: Negative num returns empty collection

test.name: testTake9
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testIif6
test.description: Contested: nothing in the spec about what to do with non-boolean criteria - mixed results from engines

test.name: testIif13
test.description: AI: $this and $index available in otherwise-result evaluation

test.name: testToInteger6
test.description: AI: Boolean false converts to 0

test.name: testToInteger7
test.description: AI: String with + prefix converts to integer

test.name: testToInteger8
test.description: AI: Non-convertible type (Date) returns empty

test.name: testToInteger9
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testToInteger10
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testToDecimal6
test.description: AI: Boolean false converts to 0.0

test.name: testToDecimal7
test.description: AI: String with sign prefix converts to Decimal

test.name: testToDecimal8
test.description: AI: String with positive sign prefix converts to Decimal

test.name: testToDecimal9
test.description: AI: Non-matching type (Date) returns empty

test.name: testToDecimal10
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testToDecimal11
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testToString6
test.description: AI: Boolean false converts to string 'false'

test.name: testToString7
test.description: AI: DateTime converts to string representation

test.name: testToString8
test.description: AI: Time converts to string representation

test.name: testToString9
test.description: HR: Partial date only includes precision present in value

test.name: testToString10
test.description: AI: Partial time only includes precision present in value

test.name: testToString11
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testToString12
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testToString13
test.description: HR: Non-matching type returns empty

test.name: testToTime1
test.description: AI: Time input returns itself

test.name: testToTime2
test.description: AI: Convertible string returns Time

test.name: testToTime3
test.description: AI: Non-matching type returns empty

test.name: testToTime4
test.description: HR: Non-convertible string returns empty

test.name: testToTime5
test.description: AI: Partial time string produces partial time

test.name: testToTime6
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testToTime7
test.description: HR: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testToDate1
test.description: AI: Date input returns itself

test.name: testToDate2
test.description: HR: DateTime input extracts year/month/day without timezone conversion

test.name: testToDate3
test.description: AI: Convertible string returns Date using default format

test.name: testToDate4
test.description: AI: Non-matching type (Integer) returns empty

test.name: testToDate5
test.description: AI: Non-convertible string returns empty

test.name: testToDate6
test.description: AI: Format parameter overrides default for string input

test.name: testToDate7
test.description: AI: Format parameter ignored for non-string (Date) input

test.name: testToDate8
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testToDate9
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testToDateTime1
test.description: AI: Convertible string returns DateTime using default format

test.name: testToDateTime2
test.description: AI: DateTime input returns itself

test.name: testToDateTime3
test.description: AI: Date input converts to DateTime with time components empty

test.name: testToDateTime4
test.description: AI: Non-matching type (Integer) returns empty

test.name: testToDateTime5
test.description: AI: Non-convertible string returns empty

test.name: testToDateTime6
test.description: AI: Partial datetime string produces partial datetime result

test.name: testToDateTime7
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testToDateTime8
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testToDateTime9
test.description: AI: Format parameter used as template for string input

test.name: testToDateTime10
test.description: AI: Format parameter ignored for non-string DateTime input

test.name: testCase5
test.description: AI: Multi-character string conversion

test.name: testCase6
test.description: AI: Mixed case string conversion

test.name: testCase7
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testCase8
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testCase9
test.description: AI: Multi-character string conversion

test.name: testCase10
test.description: AI: Mixed case string conversion

test.name: testCase11
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testCase12
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testCase13
test.description: AI: Non-String input signals error

test.name: testToChars2
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testToChars3
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testToChars4
test.description: AI: Unicode combining characters return separate character strings

test.name: testIndexOf7
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testIndexOf8
test.description: AI: Returns index of first occurrence when substring appears multiple times

test.name: testIndexOf9
test.description: AI: Index measured in Unicode scalar values, not bytes

test.name: testLastIndexOf1
test.description: AI: Returns 0-based index of last occurrence

test.name: testLastIndexOf2
test.description: AI: Returns last occurrence when substring appears multiple times

test.name: testLastIndexOf3
test.description: AI: Returns -1 if substring is not found

test.name: testLastIndexOf4
test.description: AI: Full string match returns 0

test.name: testLastIndexOf5
test.description: HR: Empty substring returns string length

test.name: testLastIndexOf6
test.description: HR: Empty substring on single char returns 1

test.name: testLastIndexOf7
test.description: AI: Empty substring on empty string returns 0

test.name: testLastIndexOf8
test.description: HR: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testLastIndexOf9
test.description: AI: Empty substring argument returns empty

test.name: testLastIndexOf10
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testSubstring13
test.description: HR: Zero length returns empty string

test.name: testSubstring14
test.description: AI: Negative length returns empty string

test.name: testSubstring15
test.description: AI: Empty length behaves as if length had not been provided

test.name: testSubstring16
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testSubstring17
test.description: HR: Unicode: start and length measured in characters not bytes

test.name: testStartsWith13
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testEndsWith11
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testMatchesCaseInsensitive1
test.description: AI: Case-insensitive flag 'i' allows matching regardless of case

test.name: testMatchesCaseInsensitive2
test.description: AI: Case-insensitive flag 'i' still matches when case already matches

test.name: testMatchesCaseInsensitive3
test.description: AI: Without 'i' flag, case mismatch returns false (control test)

test.name: testMatchesMultiLine1
test.description: HR: Multi-line flag 'm' allows ^ to match at start of each line

test.name: testMatchesMultiLine2
test.description: AI: Without 'm' flag, ^ only matches start of string

test.name: testMatchesMultipleInputError
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input collection signals error

test.name: testMatchesUnicode1
test.description: AI: Unicode letters matched by \p{L} character class

test.name: testMatchesUnicode2
test.description: AI: Unicode accented characters in both input and regex literal

test.name: testMatchesLocaleIndependence1
test.description: AI: German ß is not equivalent to ss — locale-specific equivalence must not apply

test.name: testMatchesLocaleIndependence2
test.description: HR: Turkish İ (U+0130) is not matched by ASCII I — locale-independent matching

test.name: testMatchesFull6
test.description: AI: Case-insensitive flag 'i' allows matching regardless of case

test.name: testMatchesFull7
test.description: AI: Simple exact-string full match returns true

test.name: testMatchesFull8
test.description: AI: Empty regex input returns empty

test.name: testMatchesFull9
test.description: AI: Empty string input returns empty

test.name: testMatchesFull10
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input collection signals error

test.name: testMatchesFull11
test.description: HR: Multi-line flag 'm' does not bypass full-match — partial line match returns false

test.name: testMatchesFull12
test.description: HR: Single line mode: dot matches newline characters

test.name: testMatchesFull13
test.description: AI: Unicode characters in input and regex are matched correctly

test.name: testReplaceMatches8
test.description: AI: Case-insensitive flag replaces regardless of case

test.name: testReplaceMatches9
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testReplaceMatches10
test.description: HR: Multiline flag m makes ^ match start of each line

test.name: testReplaceMatches11
test.description: HR: Substitution with numbered capture group references

test.name: testReplaceMatches12
test.description: HR: Named capture group syntax in substitution

test.name: testReplace7
test.description: AI: Multiple occurrences of pattern are all replaced

test.name: testReplace8
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testLength7
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input collection signals error

test.name: testLength8
test.description: AI: Counts Unicode scalar values not grapheme clusters - combining form has length 2

test.name: testEncodeEmptyInput
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testEncodeNoFormat
test.description: AI: No format specified returns empty

test.name: testEncodeAscii
test.description: AI: ASCII encoding replaces characters above code 127 with ?

test.name: testDecodeEmptyInput
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testDecodeNoFormat
test.description: AI: No format specified returns empty

test.name: testEscapeHtmlAmpersand
test.description: AI: HTML escaping of ampersand character

test.name: testEscapeEmptyInput
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testEscapeNoTarget
test.description: AI: No target specified returns empty

test.name: testEscapeHtmlHighCodepoint
test.description: AI: HTML escaping of characters with encoding above 127

test.name: testUnescapeEmptyInput
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testUnescapeNoTarget
test.description: AI: No target specified returns empty

test.name: testUnescapeUnknownTarget
test.description: AI: Unknown target returns empty — spec only defines html and json

test.name: testTrim7
test.description: AI: Trims tab, newline, and carriage return whitespace characters

test.name: testSplit5
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testSplit6
test.description: AI: No separator in input returns input unchanged

test.name: testJoin2
test.description: AI: Join without separator directly concatenates strings

test.name: testJoin3
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testJoin4
test.description: AI: Single item collection returns item unchanged

test.name: testTrace3
test.description: AI: $this and $index in projection, input returned unchanged

test.name: testPathname1
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testPathname2
test.description: AI: Basic pathname returns path starting with resource type

test.name: testPathname3
test.description: AI: Array element pathname includes indexer

test.name: testPathname4
test.description: AI: short parameter excludes indexer for non-array element birthDate

test.name: testPathname5
test.description: AI: Computed value via string concatenation excluded from pathname result

test.name: testPathname6
test.description: AI: resolve() to contained resource preserves pathname

test.name: testToday3
test.description: AI: Deterministic: today() returns same value within single expression, this is MUCH harder to test as it would need the test to be evaluated on the day boundary

test.name: testNow3
test.description: AI: Deterministic evaluation - now() returns same value within expression

test.name: testNow4
test.description: AI: Result includes timezone offset

test.name: testTimeOfDay1
test.description: AI: timeOfDay() returns a value with time format HH:MM:SS

test.name: testTimeOfDay2
test.description: AI: Deterministic evaluation - timeOfDay() returns same value within expression

test.name: testSort1
test.description: Prototype definition - not part of spec yet

test.name: testSort2
test.description: Prototype definition - not part of spec yet

test.name: testSort3
test.description: Prototype definition - not part of spec yet

test.name: testSort4
test.description: Prototype definition - not part of spec yet

test.name: testSort5
test.description: Prototype definition - not part of spec yet

test.name: testSort6
test.description: Prototype definition - not part of spec yet

test.name: testSort7
test.description: Prototype definition - not part of spec yet

test.name: testSort8
test.description: Prototype definition - not part of spec yet

test.name: testSort9
test.description: Prototype definition - not part of spec yet

test.name: testSort10
test.description: Prototype definition - not part of spec yet

test.name: testSort11
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testSort12
test.description: AI: Descending sort using desc keyword qualifier

test.name: testSort13
test.description: AI: Ascending sort using explicit asc keyword qualifier

test.name: testSort14
test.description: HR: Empty values sort before non-empty values in ascending order

test.name: testSort15
test.description: AI: Key selector returning multiple items signals error

test.name: testSort16
test.description: HR: $index is undefined in sort context

test.name: testSort17
test.description: AI: Sorting incompatible types (integer and string) results in error

test.name: testEquality23
test.description: This could be impacted by the timezone of the engine running the test

test.name: testEquality29
test.description: AI: Boolean equality - true equals true

test.name: testEquality30
test.description: AI: Boolean equality - true does not equal false

test.name: testEquality31
test.description: AI: Boolean equality - false equals false

test.name: testEquality32
test.description: AI: Time equality - same time values

test.name: testEquality33
test.description: AI: Time equality - different time values

test.name: testEquality34
test.description: AI: Time equality - different precision returns empty

test.name: testEquality35
test.description: AI: Quantity with invalid/incompatible units returns empty

test.name: testEquality36
test.description: AI: Calendar duration vs definite duration uncomparability returns empty

test.name: testEquivalent25
test.description: AI: Boolean equivalence - true ~ true returns true

test.name: testEquivalent26
test.description: AI: Boolean equivalence - false ~ false returns true

test.name: testEquivalent27
test.description: AI: Boolean equivalence - true ~ false returns false

test.name: testEquivalent28
test.description: AI: String whitespace normalization - tab equivalent to space

test.name: testEquivalent29
test.description: AI: Time equivalence - same time values return true

test.name: testEquivalent30
test.description: AI: Time equivalence - different time values return false

test.name: testEquivalent31
test.description: AI: Time equivalence - different precision returns false not empty

test.name: testEquivalent32
test.description: AI: Quantity with invalid/incompatible units returns false

test.name: testLessOrEqual28
test.description: AI: DateTime with timezone offset - same moment in different timezones

test.name: testLessOrEqual29
test.description: AI: DateTime with timezone offset - strictly less when timezones considered

test.name: testLessOrEqual30
test.description: AI: DateTime with timezone offset - greater returns false

test.name: testLessOrEqual31
test.description: AI: Quantity cross-unit conversion - 4 meters is not <= 4 centimeters

test.name: testLessOrEqual32
test.description: AI: Quantity cross-unit conversion - 3 centimeters <= 4 meters

test.name: testGreatorOrEqual28
test.description: AI: DateTime with timezone offset - same moment in different timezones

test.name: testGreatorOrEqual29
test.description: AI: DateTime with timezone offset - greater when timezones considered

test.name: testGreatorOrEqual30
test.description: HR: DateTime with timezone offset - lesser returns false

test.name: testGreatorOrEqual31
test.description: AI: Quantity cross-unit conversion - 4 meters >= 4 centimeters

test.name: testGreatorOrEqual32
test.description: AI: Quantity cross-unit conversion - 3 centimeters is not >= 4 meters

test.name: testCombine4
test.description: AI: Combining empty collection with non-empty returns non-empty

test.name: testCombine5
test.description: AI: preserveOrder=true appends other to input preserving order

test.name: testUnion13
test.description: AI: Union with empty collection returns original items

test.name: testUnion14
test.description: AI: Union with empty collection returns distinct items from non-empty collection

test.name: testUnion15
test.description: AI: Union deduplication uses equals (=) semantics - case-sensitive for strings

test.name: testUnion16
test.description: AI: Union operator deduplication uses equals (=) not equivalent (~) - case-sensitive for strings

test.name: testUnion17
test.description: AI: | operator produces same result as union() function

test.name: testIntersect5
test.description: AI: Empty input collection intersected with non-empty returns empty

test.name: testIntersect6
test.description: AI: Intersect with string type collections

test.name: testIntersect7
test.description: AI: Intersect returns multiple common items, order not guaranteed

test.name: testInImplicitConversion
test.description: AI: Integer in Decimal collection uses equality with implicit type conversion

test.name: testInQuantityUnitConversion
test.description: AI: Quantity membership with UCUM unit conversion

test.name: testBooleanImplies10
test.description: AI: Singleton evaluation: non-boolean single-node operand evaluates to true

test.name: testPlusQuantity1
test.description: AI: Quantity addition with same dimension but different units

test.name: testPlusOverflow1
test.description: AI: Integer addition overflow returns empty

test.name: testMinus5
test.description: Contested: single quotes are ucum units, which are not applicable to date arithmetic

test.name: testMinusQuantity1
test.description: AI: Quantity subtraction with same dimension but different units

test.name: testMinusUnderflow1
test.description: AI: Integer subtraction underflow returns empty

test.name: testMultiply4
test.description: AI: Quantity multiplication with same units produces squared unit

test.name: testMultiply5
test.description: AI: Quantity multiplication with higher-dimension units (cm * cm2 = cm3)

test.name: testDivide7
test.description: anything deivided by zero is empty, even if it is zero itself

test.name: testRound3
test.description: AI: Traditional rounding: 0.5 rounds up to 1

test.name: testRound4
test.description: HR: Traditional rounding: negative -0.5 rounds to -1

test.name: testRound5
test.description: HR: Negative precision signals error

test.name: testRound6
test.description: HR: Quantity input returns Quantity with same units

test.name: testRound7
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testSqrt3
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testSqrt4
test.description: HR: sqrt is equivalent to power(0.5)

test.name: testAbsPositive
test.description: AI: Absolute value of positive input returns same value

test.name: testAbsMultiple
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testAbsLong
test.description: AI: Absolute value of Long input

test.name: testCeiling5
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testCeiling6
test.description: AI: Quantity input returns Quantity with same units and integer value

test.name: testExp4
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testExp5
test.description: AI: Positive exponent returns e raised to the power

test.name: testExp6
test.description: AI: Negative exponent returns e raised to negative power

test.name: testExp7
test.description: AI: Integer input accepted via implicit conversion to Decimal

test.name: testFloor5
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testFloor6
test.description: AI: Quantity input returns Quantity with same units and floored value

test.name: testLn3
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testLn4
test.description: AI: Natural logarithm of non-trivial value verifies correctness

test.name: testLn5
test.description: HR: ln of zero is undefined and signals error

test.name: testLn6
test.description: HR: ln of negative number is undefined and signals error

test.name: testLnLong
test.description: AI: Long input via implicit conversion to Decimal

test.name: testLogZeroInput
test.description: AI: Zero input signals error

test.name: testLogZeroBase
test.description: AI: Zero base signals error

test.name: testLogNegativeBase
test.description: HR: Negative base signals error

test.name: testLogMultipleItems
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testLogLongInput
test.description: AI: Long input via implicit conversion to Decimal

test.name: testPower4
test.description: AI: Negative exponent produces Decimal result

test.name: testPower5
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testPower6
test.description: AI: Result of integer power is always Decimal

test.name: testPowerLong
test.description: AI: Long input via implicit conversion to Decimal

test.name: testTruncate4
test.description: AI: Quantity input returns Quantity with same units and integer value

test.name: testTruncate5
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testPrecedence1
test.description: test unary precedence

test.name: testPrecedence7
test.description: AI: and (#11) binds tighter than xor (#12): true xor (true and false) = true xor false = true

test.name: testPrecedence8
test.description: AI: implies (#13) has lower precedence than or (#12): (true or false) implies false = false

test.name: testPrecedence9
test.description: AI: div (#04) binds tighter than + (#05): 7 + (10 div 3) = 10, not (7+10) div 3 = 5

test.name: testPrecedence10
test.description: AI: Parentheses override default * before + precedence: (1+2)*3 = 9, not 1+(2*3) = 7

test.name: testPrecedence11
test.description: AI: mod (#04) binds tighter than + (#05): 5 + (10 mod 3) = 6, not (5+10) mod 3 = 0

test.name: testPrecedence12
test.description: AI: & (#05) binds tighter than = (#09): ('a' & 'b') = 'ab' is true, not 'a' & ('b' = 'ab')

test.name: testPrecedence13
test.description: AI: [] (#02) binds tighter than | (#07): 1 | 2 | 3[0] gives {1,2,3} (3 items) not (1|2|3)[0] = 1

test.name: testPrecedence14
test.description: AI: contains (#10) binds tighter than and (#11): (collection contains item) and true = true

test.name: testPrecedence15
test.description: AI: != (#09) binds less tightly than >= (#08): (3 >= 2) != false = true != false = true

test.name: testPrecedence16
test.description: AI: !~ (#09) binds less tightly than <= (#08): (2 <= 3) !~ false = true !~ false = true

test.name: testType22
test.description: Note: Some systems may return an error due to failing to resolve System.Patient

test.name: testType24
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: testType25
test.description: AI: Type specifier on polymorphic choice element - Quantity treated as type not identifier

test.name: testType26
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty for type()

test.name: testType27
test.description: AI: baseType for SimpleTypeInfo on primitive is System.Any

test.name: testType28
test.description: AI: baseType for ClassInfo on FHIR element is FHIR.Element

test.name: LowBoundaryEmptyInput
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty

test.name: LowBoundaryDateDefault
test.description: AI: Date with default precision uses max precision (4 = day)

test.name: LowBoundaryDateTimeDefault
test.description: AI: DateTime with default precision uses max precision (at least 17)

test.name: LowBoundaryTimeDefault
test.description: AI: Time with default precision uses max precision (at least 9)

test.name: LowBoundaryMultipleItems
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input collection signals error

test.name: HighBoundaryEmpty
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: HighBoundaryMultiple
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: HighBoundaryDateDefault
test.description: AI: Date with default precision fills to day

test.name: HighBoundaryDateTimeDefault
test.description: AI: DateTime with default precision fills to millisecond

test.name: HighBoundaryTimeDefault
test.description: AI: Time with default precision (at least 9) fills to millisecond

test.name: Comparable4
test.description: AI: Same unit comparison returns true

test.name: Comparable5
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty collection

test.name: Comparable6
test.description: AI: Integer implicit conversion to Quantity with unit '1' makes them comparable

test.name: Comparable7
test.description: AI: Decimal implicit conversion to Quantity makes bare numbers comparable

test.name: Comparable8
test.description: AI: Non-single input returns empty collection

test.name: PrecisionDateMonth
test.description: AI: Date with month precision

test.name: PrecisionDateDay
test.description: AI: Date with day precision

test.name: PrecisionDateTimeHours
test.description: AI: DateTime with hours-only precision

test.name: PrecisionDateTimeMinutes
test.description: AI: DateTime with hours and minutes precision

test.name: PrecisionMultipleItems
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

group.name: from-Zulip
group.notes: These tests are based on the discussion here: https://chat.fhir.org/#narrow/stream/179266-fhirpath/topic/Singleton.20Evaluation.20of.20Collections In particular, per Singleton Evaluation of Collections, if an argument does not implicitly convert to a boolean, it is considered true if there is a single element, empty otherwise, so `true and 'foo'` evaluates to `true`, which is not empty, but `true | 'foo'` is a collection, which results in an error because `'foo'` cannot be converted to a boolean for consideration in `allTrue()`.

test.name: testIndex
test.description: select $index based on condition

test.name: testPeriodInvariantOld
test.description: old period invariant using hasValue() - incorrectly rejects valid boundary data

test.name: testPeriodInvariantNew
test.description: new period invariant using lowBoundary/highBoundary - correctly accepts boundary data

test.name: testFHIRPathIsFunction11
test.description: AI: Error when input collection contains more than one item

test.name: testFHIRPathIsFunction12
test.description: AI: Error when type identifier cannot be resolved to a valid type

test.name: testFHIRPathAsFunction11
test.description: Contested: code type is a subtype of string

test.name: testFHIRPathAsFunction16
test.description: Contested: code type is a subtype of string

test.name: testFHIRPathAsFunction25
test.description: AI: Qualified type specifier with FHIR model qualifier

test.name: testFHIRPathAsFunction26
test.description: AI: Subclass type matching - Age is a subclass of Quantity, so as(Quantity) returns the value

test.name: testYearOf1
test.description: AI: Year from Date literal

test.name: testYearOf2
test.description: AI: Year from DateTime literal

test.name: testYearOf3
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testYearOf4
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testMonthOf1
test.description: AI: Month from Date literal

test.name: testMonthOf2
test.description: AI: Month from DateTime literal

test.name: testMonthOf3
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testMonthOf4
test.description: AI: Year-only Date without month returns empty

test.name: testMonthOf5
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testDayOf1
test.description: AI: Day from Date literal

test.name: testDayOf2
test.description: AI: Day from DateTime literal

test.name: testDayOf3
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testDayOf4
test.description: AI: Year-only Date without day returns empty

test.name: testDayOf5
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testHourOf1
test.description: AI: Hour from DateTime literal with timezone

test.name: testHourOf2
test.description: AI: Hour from DateTime literal afternoon

test.name: testHourOf3
test.description: AI: Hour from Time literal

test.name: testHourOf4
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testHourOf5
test.description: AI: Date without hour returns empty

test.name: testHourOf6
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testMinuteOf1
test.description: AI: Minute from DateTime literal with timezone

test.name: testMinuteOf2
test.description: AI: Minute from Time literal

test.name: testMinuteOf3
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testMinuteOf4
test.description: AI: DateTime without minute returns empty

test.name: testMinuteOf5
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testSecondOf1
test.description: AI: Second from DateTime literal with timezone

test.name: testSecondOf2
test.description: AI: Second from Time literal

test.name: testSecondOf3
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testSecondOf4
test.description: AI: DateTime without second returns empty

test.name: testSecondOf5
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testMillisecondOf1
test.description: AI: Millisecond from DateTime literal with timezone

test.name: testMillisecondOf2
test.description: AI: Millisecond from Time literal

test.name: testMillisecondOf3
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testMillisecondOf4
test.description: AI: DateTime without millisecond returns empty

test.name: testMillisecondOf5
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testTimezoneOffsetOf1
test.description: AI: Negative timezone offset returns decimal hours

test.name: testTimezoneOffsetOf2
test.description: AI: Fractional timezone offset (+08:45) returns 8.75

test.name: testTimezoneOffsetOf3
test.description: AI: UTC offset returns 0.0

test.name: testTimezoneOffsetOf4
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testTimezoneOffsetOf5
test.description: AI: DateTime without timezone offset returns empty

test.name: testTimezoneOffsetOf6
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testTimeOf1
test.description: AI: Single DateTime returns time component

test.name: testTimeOf2
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testTimeOf3
test.description: AI: Date-only value without time returns empty

test.name: testTimeOf4
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testDateOf1
test.description: AI: DateTime literal returns date component

test.name: testDateOf2
test.description: AI: Date literal returns same date

test.name: testDateOf3
test.description: HR: Date with year-only precision returns year-only date

test.name: testDateOf4
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testDateOf5
test.description: AI: Multiple items in input signals error

test.name: testCoalesce1
test.description: AI: Returns first non-empty collection when first argument is non-empty

test.name: testCoalesce2
test.description: HR: All arguments empty returns empty collection

test.name: testCoalesce3
test.description: AI: Falls back to second argument when first is empty

test.name: testCoalesce4
test.description: AI: Falls back to third argument when first two are empty

test.name: testCoalesce5
test.description: AI: Fallback pattern selecting name by use preference

test.name: testCoalesce6
test.description: AI: Short-circuit: second argument not evaluated when first is non-empty

test.name: testDifference1
test.description: AI: Week boundary crossed between Jan 2 and Jan 7 (Sunday falls between)

test.name: testDifference2
test.description: AI: Negative result when input is after value argument (month precision)

test.name: testDifference3
test.description: AI: Date year precision - spec example, no year boundary crossed

test.name: testDifference4
test.description: AI: Date year precision - spec example, year boundary crossed

test.name: testDifference5
test.description: AI: Date day precision difference

test.name: testDifference6
test.description: AI: DateTime hour precision difference

test.name: testDifference7
test.description: AI: Time hour precision difference

test.name: testDifference8
test.description: AI: Time minute precision difference

test.name: testDifference9
test.description: AI: Less precision than requested returns empty - year-only date with month precision

test.name: testDifference10
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testDifference11
test.description: AI: DateTime with different timezone offsets normalized for hour precision

test.name: testDifference12
test.description: AI: Multiple input items signals error

test.name: testDuration1
test.description: AI: Spec example - 5 days is 0 whole weeks

test.name: testDuration2
test.description: AI: Spec example - 8 months is 0 whole years

test.name: testDuration3
test.description: AI: Spec example - 9 months is 0 whole years

test.name: testDuration4
test.description: AI: Full year elapsed returns 1

test.name: testDuration5
test.description: AI: Negative result when input is after value (month precision)

test.name: testDuration6
test.description: AI: Fractional periods dropped - 45 days is 1 whole month

test.name: testDuration7
test.description: AI: Date day precision - 14 days elapsed

test.name: testDuration8
test.description: AI: DateTime hour precision difference

test.name: testDuration9
test.description: AI: DateTime minute precision difference

test.name: testDuration10
test.description: AI: Time hour precision difference

test.name: testDuration11
test.description: AI: Time minute precision difference

test.name: testDuration12
test.description: AI: Less precision than requested returns empty - year-only date with month precision

test.name: testDuration13
test.description: AI: Empty input returns empty

test.name: testDuration14
test.description: AI: DateTime with different timezone offsets normalized for hour precision

test.name: testDuration15
test.description: AI: Multiple input items signals error

test.name: testDuration16
test.description: AI: 7 days is exactly 1 whole week

test.name: testDuration17
test.description: AI: DateTime second precision difference

test.name: testDuration18
test.description: AI: Time millisecond precision difference

test.name: testInstanceSelector1
test.description: AI: Empty input collection returns empty result
